name: Bushwood Golf Shack
about: Bushwood Golf Shack is a locally owned and operated golf supply store and simulator venue located in Auburndale, Florida, at the International World Flea Market. The business features a golf simulator room where players can choose from over 40+ courses, play solo or with up to four players, and utilize a driving range for swing analysis. The store specializes in new and used golf equipment, including golf balls, clubs, bags, and accessories, with a focus on lefty-friendly options and custom club fitting services. They also offer services like club re-gripping and repair.
why_golfers_like_it: Extensive selection of over 20,000 used golf balls at competitive prices
On-site custom club fitting and building services with simulator testing
Support for left-handed golfers with a wide variety of lefty-specific items
Flexible simulator options for practice on 40+ courses or driving range

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available at a low price, and you can also test custom-built clubs in the simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time varies by group size: 1-2 people take 1-2 hours, 2 people take 2-3 hours, and 3-4 people take 3-4 hours.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers a welcoming atmosphere for junior golfers.
